prompts.name: Soft Bloom
prompts.text: Add gentle bloom to bright highlights while keeping important details clear and controlled.

prompts.name: Film Grain
prompts.text: Add subtle film grain for texture and cinematic character without reducing clarity.

prompts.name: Soft Vignette
prompts.text: Add a soft vignette to guide focus toward the subject while keeping the frame natural.

prompts.name: Warm Color Grade
prompts.text: Apply a warm color grade that enhances skin tones, golden highlights, and emotional warmth.

prompts.name: Cool Color Grade
prompts.text: Apply a cool color grade with blues, teals, and restrained contrast for a calm mood.

prompts.name: High Contrast
prompts.text: Increase contrast for stronger drama while preserving detail in both highlights and shadows.

prompts.name: Low Contrast
prompts.text: Use lower contrast for a soft, gentle, airy, or nostalgic final look.

prompts.name: Sharpen Subject
prompts.text: Sharpen the main subject subtly, especially the eyes, face, hair, and key outfit details.

prompts.name: Soft Background
prompts.text: Soften the background slightly to improve subject separation and visual focus.

prompts.name: Light Leaks
prompts.text: Add tasteful light leaks for analog charm, warmth, and casual photographic character.

prompts.name: Subtle Chromatic Aberration
prompts.text: Add very subtle chromatic aberration only at high-contrast edges for cinematic lens character.

prompts.name: HDR Balance
prompts.text: Balance dynamic range so shadows retain detail and highlights remain controlled.

prompts.name: Matte Finish
prompts.text: Apply a matte finish with softened blacks, controlled highlights, and refined editorial mood.

prompts.name: Glossy Finish
prompts.text: Apply a glossy polished finish with clean highlights, rich color, and premium presentation.

prompts.name: Clean Export
prompts.text: Finish with clean export quality, no visible compression artifacts, strong clarity, and consistent style.
